upload.title: Absence Report
upload.infoBody: Please upload your confirmation document first. The system will automatically extract the relevant data and fill in the fields for you.
upload.invalidFileType: Only JPG, PNG, and PDF files are allowed.
upload.documentTypeHint: Medical certificate, excuse note, or other supporting document
upload.fileTypeSizeHint: Supported formats: PDF, JPG, PNG • Maximum size: 10 MB
upload.fileSizeError: Document must be smaller than {{size}} MB.

uploadReview.title: Absence Details
uploadReview.instructions: Your document has been processed. Please review the details before submitting.

uploadConfirmation.uploadSuccessDescription: Your absence report has been saved and forwarded.
